name: code-quality
description: General-purpose code review and quality analysis workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Review code changes and identify quality issues.
interface.longDescription: A general-purpose Codex plugin for reviewing pull requests, commit ranges, working-tree changes, and targeted code paths across correctness, tests, maintainability, security, and performance.
defaultPrompt: Review this PR for code quality issues.
Audit the current diff for bugs and missing tests.
Clean up avoidable defensive error handling.
